challenges.title: Clear After Floats
challenges.description: Create a layout with two floated boxes followed by a paragraph. Use clear to make the paragraph appear below the floats.
requirements: Use clear: both on the paragraph
Paragraph should start below the floats

solution.html:
Box 1
Box 2

This paragraph uses clear: both, so it appears below the floated boxes instead of wrapping around them.
solution.explanation: The paragraph has clear: both, which pushes it below both preceding left-floated boxes.

challenges.title: Clearfix on a Parent Container
challenges.description: Create a parent container with floated children. Use clearfix to make the parent properly contain its children (visible background/border).
requirements: Parent with a background color and border
Parent must visibly wrap around children

solution.html:
1
2
3

The parent properly wraps around its children thanks to clearfix.
solution.explanation: The clearfix on the parent (using ::after pseudo-element with clear: both) makes the parent expand to contain its floated children.

challenges.title: Multi-Row Float Gallery with Row Breaks
challenges.description: Create a gallery layout with 3 columns. Use clear to create row breaks after every 3 items.
requirements: Use clear to create row breaks
Each item has equal width and margin

solution.html:
1
2
3
4
5
6
solution.explanation: An empty div with clear: both is inserted after every 3 items to force a new row. The gallery itself also has clearfix.

challenges.title: Article with Sidebar and Clear Sections
challenges.description: Create an article layout with a floated sidebar and main content. Use clear to separate article sections.
requirements: Each section uses clear: both to start on a new line

solution.html:
Sidebar

Related content and links.

Article Title

Main article content here...

Section 1

This section starts below all floats.

Section 2

Also below floats, thanks to clear: both.
solution.explanation: The sidebar is floated right, content floated left. Each section uses clear: both to start on a new line below the floats.

challenges.title: Complex Magazine Layout Using Float + Clear
challenges.description: Build a complete magazine-style page that uses float and clear for layout. Include a header, featured article, three-column story grid, two-column content section, and footer. Use clears and clearfixes strategically.
requirements: Featured article with floated image and text wrap
3-column story grid (float left, clear after every 3rd)
All parents must have clearfix where needed
Responsive to single column on mobile

solution.html:
Magazine

HomeArticlesGalleryContact
Featured Image

Featured Article Title

This is the featured article with a floated image that text wraps around. Clearfix on the featured div keeps it contained.

Story 1

Latest news update.

Story 2

In-depth analysis.

Story 3

Editor's pick.

Story 4

Tech review.

Story 5

Opinion piece.

Story 6

Interview.

Main Article

This is the main content area. It's floated left alongside the sidebar.

Sidebar

Related links and ads.

© 2026 Magazine - clear: both keeps me below all floats
solution.explanation: This magazine page demonstrates: clearfix on floated parent containers, clear: both on row breaks for the story grid, clear: both on the footer, responsive breakpoints that switch from float to block layout.
